name: lid grip
intro: The lid grip for apothecaries is a small, adhesive device designed to provide a secure grip on apothecary jar lids. This product is commonly used in pharmacies and laboratories to prevent accidents and spills when handling potentially hazardous or caustic substances. Apothecaries use the lid grip to minimize the risk of dropping the jar, which can cause contamination, injury, or damage to equipment. The lid grip is an essential tool for maintaining a safe and organized workspace. It is especially useful for apothecaries who handle large quantities of materials.
